subject: [PATCH v2] btrfs: fix use-after-free in move_existing_remap()

reviews.author: Mark Harmstone
reviews.summary: Posted the original patch with a clear explanation of the bug and proposed fix, including relevant code changes.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: The patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the move_existing_remap() function of the Btrfs filesystem by getting and putting the destination block group at the start and end of the function respectively, eliminating unnecessary lookups.
